nasb.text: Then the whole congregation of the sons of Israel assembled themselves at Shiloh, and set up the tent of meeting there; and the land was subdued before them.

esv.text: Then the whole congregation of the people of Israel assembled at Shiloh and set up the tent of meeting there. The land lay subdued before them.

cnv.text: 以色列全體會眾聚集在示羅，把會幕豎立在那裡，因為那地在他們面前被征服了。

ccb.text: 征服了这些地方以后，以色列全体会众都聚集在示罗，把会幕设立在那里。
